nasb.text: When they saw him from a distance and before he came close to them, they plotted against him to put him to death.

esv.text: They saw him from afar, and before he came near to them they conspired against him to kill him.

cnv.text: 他們遠遠就看見了他；趁他還沒有走近，大家就謀害他，要把他殺死。

ccb.text: 约瑟的哥哥们远远看见他走来，趁他还没有到跟前，就合谋要害死他。

csbs.text: 他们从远处看见了他。在他靠近之前，他们就图谋要置他于死地。
